name: Produttori del Barbaresco
visitPolicy: walk-in tasting; cellar tour by appointment
blurb: The Produttori is a cooperative of 56 grower members who bottle all their fruit under a single label with no vanity pricing, which means a single-vineyard Riserva here costs a fraction of what a comparable Gaja cru runs. The free walk-in tasting room in the village makes this one of the most accessible serious-wine experiences in the entire Langhe, and the mix of village-level Barbaresco alongside the nine single-vineyard Riservas lets you do a genuine comparative exercise without scheduling weeks in advance.
